text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the year, the Arima Kinen, is
about to start soon!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Fan
text_block_list.text:
I already know the Empress is going to win this
year's race! I can feel it in my gut!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The lineup this year really is something... I wonder
who's gonna win?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Expectations are high here at the Arima Kinen. I
can feel the tension in the venue even from here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
As a member of the Mejiro family, I can't afford
to embarrass myself in front of Air Groove and
the other senior racers, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Obviously. Later!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'll be back in a bit!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Incredible! ☆ Everyone looks so marvelous
today! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Incredible! ☆ Everyone looks so marvelous
today! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure this race will be absolutely marvelous! ☆
My heart is pounding with excitement! ★

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone's in excellent form! Senior racers are
really on an entirely different level!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (But still, the most spectacular racer out here is...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for your support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Air Groove! Her aura is breathtaking!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Good seeing you here, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(It's so hard to breathe with her standing so close!
I feel like I'm getting crushed by her presence
alone!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All of the racers here today—including you—are
distinguished contenders.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Be careful not to get swept up in everything too
easily.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I won't!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(She's right. I can't afford to be overwhelmed
now. I have to be ready to take everyone
on—even Air Groove—at my very best!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I look forward to running with you!
